entries.text:
Verses 1-12

And he entered again into the synagogue; and there was a man there which had a withered hand.

For the exposition, see the notes at Matthew 12:9-21.

Verses 13-19

And he goeth up into a mountain, and calleth unto him whom he would: and they came unto him.

For the exposition, see the notes at Luke 6:12-19.

Verses 20-30

And the multitude cometh together again, so that they could not so much as eat bread.

For the exposition, see the notes at Matthew 12:22-37, and at Luke 11:21-26.

Verses 31-35

There came then his brethren and his mother, and, standing without, sent unto him, calling him.

For the exposition, see the notes at Matthew 12:46-50.
